title: Uno Reverse Card Of Undying
description: This texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a customizable UNO Reverse Card - adding a fun twist to your Minecraft survival experience.
body:
An upgraded version of my original resource pack, which gives you the option of substituting the "totem of undying" with a "uno reverse card"

//

### **Uno Reverse Card Of Undying - Changes:**

⤷ Replace the totem of undying texture with the UNO reverse card in the yellow color

It supports every version - if it says it's incompatible just proceed to apply the texture pack, it will work

//
